aiCommentEN: Calm mind, yet market waves crash on
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期趋势看涨。
【关键位置】
71,500 美元支撑位，72,500 美元阻力位。
【短线策略】
低位买入，高位卖出。
【风险提醒】
注意市场波动风险。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin's short-term trend is bullish.
[Key Drivers]
$71,500 support level, $72,500 resistance level.
[Outlook]
Buy at low, sell at high.
[Reminder]
Be aware of market fluctuation risks.
